text.title: Audience to Customer Funnel Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Audience to Customer Funnel end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: define-stages
step.action: Confirm the 4 fixed stages; pick one KPI per stage.

step.name: wire-tracking
step.action: Verify each KPI is collected; backfill 30 days where needed.

step.name: set-thresholds
step.action: Set drop_off_threshold per stage at baseline × 0.7.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Assign a named owner per stage.
step.decision-gate: If any owner is plural, refuse to publish.
